summary: A Go-based monolithic project centered around a test runner and MCP handlers, heavily utilizing AI agents for extensive test generation.
concerns: high volume of auto-generated extra tests suggests potential fragility in core logic
uncommitted staged and modified files in working directory
deeply nested agent-generated test directories may cause maintenance overhead
heavy reliance on _extra_test.go files could indicate gaps in primary test coverage
suggestions: consolidate or clean up the numerous GOrchestra agent-generated test directories
commit or stash the currently staged and modified files to maintain a clean state
evaluate if extra tests can be merged into standard test files for better cohesion
focus on the runner and MCP handler stability as they are the core execution components
